PERCYJACKSON-POSEIDONS_BLESSING.descript: At the start of your turn, raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
PERCYJACKSON-POSEIDONS_BLESSING.title: Poseidon's Blessing
PERCYJACKSON-TIDE_BREAKER.description: At the start of your turn, raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] and maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
PERCYJACKSON-TIDE_BREAKER.title: Tidebreaker
